name: manage_skill
description: Create, inspect, apply, or reject controlled skill change proposals. Use this for self-evolution when a repeated workflow lesson should become a reusable skill. Proposals are safety-scanned; applying a proposal mutates active user skills and requires confirmation.

proposal_id.description: Proposal id for view_proposal, apply_proposal, or reject_proposal.

skill_id.description: Existing user skill id for propose_patch. Built-in skill ids are read-only.

name.description: Skill name for propose_create, or replacement name for propose_patch.

description.description: Concise trigger description for the proposed skill.

content.description: Full proposed skill body. Keep it procedural, specific, and reusable.

rationale.description: Why this skill change is warranted, grounded in observed repeated behavior or user feedback.

status.description: Optional proposal status filter for list_proposals.

limit.description: Maximum proposals to return for list_proposals.
